svg.text: input → movement → collision → dialogue → choice → memory → doorway → ending
[E] continue at the final doorway · play again, clean slate
— [Q] "stay a little longer" at the final doorway
"you were always going to make it."
[Q] stay a little longer · chair appears
player enters doorway zone (rectangular slab, not a point)
all memories handled? → overlay fades in
[E] continue → tween out → next hallway (or restart on final year)
[Q] go back → tween out → player nudged back into hallway · revise choices
final year [Q] → "stay a little longer" → chair appears · enters EPILOGUE PATH above
epilogueMode: forward doorway sealed, LEFT edge becomes back-doorway, memories show "·" only
